ddls:
CREATE TABLE "works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literary work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the literary work */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the literary work */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the literary work */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the literary work */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the literary work */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata (e.g., ISBN, publisher) */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series the work belongs to */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the work */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the work */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the work */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the cover image of the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES work_authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES work_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work the character belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the character */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance level (e.g., main, secondary, minor) */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* Chapter or scene where the character first appears */,
  "last_appearance" TEXT /* Chapter or scene where the character last appears */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the character's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the metrics belong to */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality of the character */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree centrality of the character */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness centrality of the character */,
  "closeness_corrected" REAL /* Corrected closeness centrality of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the character's connections */,
  "eigenvector_centrality" REAL /* Eigenvector centrality of the character */,
  "avg_distance" REAL /* Average distance of the character from others */,
  "avg_distance_corrected" REAL /* Corrected average distance of the character from others */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the character's appearance */,
  "speech_acts" INTEGER /* Number of speech acts performed by the character */,
  "words" INTEGER /* Number of words spoken by the character */,
  "lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines spoken by the character */,
  "chars" INTEGER /* Number of characters spoken by the character */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the character */,
  "load_centrality" REAL /* Load centrality of the character */,
  "harmonic_centrality" REAL /* Harmonic centrality of the character */,
  "pagerank" REAL /* PageRank of the character */,
  "subgraph_centrality" REAL /* Subgraph centrality of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_metrics_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of rankings */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the rankings belong to */,
  "degree_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on degree centrality */,
  "closeness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on closeness centrality */,
  "betweenness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on betweenness centrality */,
  "strength_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on strength */,
  "eigenvector_centrality_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on eigenvector centrality */,
  "frequency_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on frequency of appearance */,
  "speech_acts_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on number of speech acts */,
  "words_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on number of words spoken */,
  "clustering_coefficient_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on clustering coefficient */,
  "load_centrality_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on load centrality */,
  "harmonic_centrality_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on harmonic centrality */,
  "pagerank_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on PageRank */,
  "subgraph_centrality_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on subgraph centrality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_ranks_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_aggregates" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of aggregated metrics */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the aggregates belong to */,
  "centrality_rank_avg" REAL /* Average of all centrality ranks */,
  "centrality_rank_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of all centrality ranks */,
  "centrality_rank_avg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on average of all centrality ranks */,
  "centrality_rank_std_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on standard deviation of all centrality ranks */,
  "avg_graph_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on graph metrics */,
  "avg_content_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on content metrics */,
  "overall_avg" REAL /* Overall average of all metrics */,
  "overall_avg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on overall average */,
  "clustering_coefficient_avg" REAL /* Average of clustering coefficient */,
  "load_centrality_avg" REAL /* Average of load centrality */,
  "harmonic_centrality_avg" REAL /* Average of harmonic centrality */,
  "pagerank_avg" REAL /* Average of PageRank */,
  "subgraph_centrality_avg" REAL /* Average of subgraph centrality */,
  "clustering_coefficient_avg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on average clustering coefficient */,
  "load_centrality_avg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on average load centrality */,
  "harmonic_centrality_avg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on average harmonic centrality */,
  "pagerank_avg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on average PageRank */,
  "subgraph_centrality_avg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on average subgraph centrality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_aggregates_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work the interaction belongs to */,
  "character1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the interaction */,
  "character2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., conversation, action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the interaction */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day the interaction takes place (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "emotional_tone" TEXT /* Emotional tone of the interaction (e.g., happy, sad, neutral) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the interaction (e.g., party, office, home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_character2_id FOREIGN KEY ("character2_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_character1_id FOREIGN KEY ("character1_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of interaction metrics */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction the metrics belong to */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the interaction */,
  "speech_acts" INTEGER /* Number of speech acts in the interaction */,
  "words" INTEGER /* Number of words in the interaction */,
  "lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines in the interaction */,
  "chars" INTEGER /* Number of characters in the interaction */,
  "positive_words" INTEGER /* Number of positive words in the interaction */,
  "negative_words" INTEGER /* Number of negative words in the interaction */,
  "neutral_words" INTEGER /* Number of neutral words in the interaction */,
  "emotional_intensity" REAL /* Emotional intensity of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_metrics_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* User's active status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work being accessed */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work the metadata belongs to */,
  "ISBN" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series the work belongs to */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_metadata_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)
